title: Totem Hand Pop
description: Shows the totem pop animation on the side that you popped your totem.
body:
**Totem Hand Pop**
---
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-5865F2?logo=discord&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/A2Nx9kxDeB) [![Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modrinth-1bd96a?logo=modrinth&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)](https://modrinth.com/user/cutebow)
--- Totem Hand Pop is a mod that moves the vanilla totem pop animation to the side of the screen based on the hand that actually popped. If your mainhand totem pops, the animation shows on the mainhand side. If your offhand totem pops, it shows on the offhand side instead of always being stuck in the middle of your screen. The biggest thing with this mod is that it keeps the normal Minecraft totem pop animation, but lets you control where it appears. It does not make a fake custom pop overlay, it moves and scales the vanilla floating item render so the animation still feels like Minecraft, just cleaner and less in the way. Totem Hand Pop also has a built in position editor so you can drag the mainhand and offhand pop locations anywhere you want. You can resize each pop, use a grid for cleaner placement, reset positions back to default, and swap the mainhand/offhand sides if you want the layout reversed. The mod is made to be lightweight and simple. It only runs on the client, does not change gameplay, does not send packets, and does not require a server-side mod. It is also works with vulkan mod incase you're wondering. - Commands: /thp, /totemhandpop - Or use mod menu **Idea by:** januaryneverends **Check out my other mods!:** - [Anchor Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/anchor-glow) - [Crystal Glow](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystal-glow) **Main Hand Pop (Supports left hand players as well)** ![Main Hand Pop (Supports left hand players as well)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/2Yj58Nfw/images/8d669d38ea678313836f0c088bf42334cb68f58f.png) --- **Requires** - Mod menu
Settings / Features List
Section Settings What it does
Totem Pop Mainhand Pop, Offhand Pop Moves the vanilla totem pop animation to the correct side of the screen depending on which hand popped.
Hand Detection Mainhand / Offhand Tracking Checks the player inventory around the pop so the animation can match the hand that actually used the totem.
General Mod Toggle, Swap Mainhand With Offhand Lets you turn the mod on or off and reverse the mainhand/offhand pop sides if you prefer the opposite layout.
Position Editor Open Editor, Drag Boxes, Resize Corners, Reset Positions Lets you move and resize both pop positions directly on screen instead of guessing with sliders.
Grid Grid Toggle, Grid Scale Adds a grid to the editor so the pop positions are easier to line up cleanly.
Commands /thp, /totemhandpop Lets you open the editor, open settings, toggle the mod, swap sides, or reset positions with client-side commands.
Screen Safety Position Clamping Keeps the pop boxes inside the screen so the animation does not get placed off screen.
Vulkan Support Vanilla Overlay Based Rendering works with Vulkan.
